last_digest.under_control: Mostly — 5 items need immediate escalation (🚨), 10 more need attention (🔴)
last_digest.urgent_vs_smaller: 5 urgent, 10 need a nudge, 15 to watch, 3 handled well

last_digest.green_note: 2× P2 handled competently same-morning (INC-14082: RDS T4G downgrade traced & partner comms initiated within ~35min; INC-14069: root cause found, partner confirmed decommissioning, alerts to be silenced) — plus 1× P3 ping-pong noise incident (INC-14077) classified from metadata only, no breach.

synthesis.summary: Multiple EUC-hosted brands (Betamina, AviroGroup, Hyperwin, Vegas-Glory) crashed across AM Time, Singularity Time and Scheduled-Actions Live due to 'Too Many Connections' DB errors. Lead Joachim Farrugia triaged fast, correlated the failures across brands, and traced the cause to RDS instance downgrades to T4G on the affected brands within ~34 minutes of creation. Six related single-brand incidents were merged into this one.
key_events: 07:09:45Z incident created, lead Joachim Farrugia auto-assigned
07:32:04Z status -> Investigating
~07:33-07:41Z brands/services confirmed; 6 related incidents merged in
07:43:02Z root cause identified: RDS instance downgrades to T4G
07:43:52Z Joachim states he will inform partners
07:44:43Z 2 attached alerts auto-resolved

promises: Joachim: 'I will inform the partners in the meantime' at 07:43:52Z — not yet confirmed sent

proposals: Root cause pinned to RDS T4G downgrade; no rollback/remediation action documented yet

INC-14082.name: Some EUC Brands crashing due to 'Too Many Connections'

synthesis.summary: DMS heartbeat alerts fired because reconciliation jobs for Campeon-Omega stopped working (partner's Operator endpoint timing out). Joachim investigated, found the partner's own API unreachable, and confirmed with Siria Dorascenzi that Campeon-Omega is being decommissioned this week — no partner comms needed, alerts can go silent.

proposals: Silence/suppress Campeon-Omega reconciliation alerts once decommissioning completes this week

synthesis.summary: Maxima's ClickHouse writer queue backed up twice (93k then 27k unconsumed messages) due to insufficient ClickHouse disk space. Gérard Pelayo diagnosed the 'not enough space' error and recommended increasing/persisting disk allocation at 01:33 CEST, but the incident auto-declined 11 min later when the linked alert transiently resolved, and no one acted. ~5h47m later Joachim Farrugia noticed the queue backed up again, reopened, and applied the real fix (PVC 1380Gi->1600Gi).
key_events: 01:29:42Z created, Gérard auto-assigned, acknowledged
01:33:06Z Gérard recommends increasing/persisting disk allocation
01:44:39Z incident auto-declined (linked alert resolved)
05:31:44Z Joachim joins, monitoring
06:26-06:27Z reopened (Declined->Triage->Fixing), INC-14076 merged in
06:32-06:33Z PVC upgraded 1380Gi->1600Gi
06:49:43Z remaining alert resolved
proposals: Increase/persist ClickHouse PVC size - Gérard's recommendation not acted on for ~5h47m, now applied as 1380Gi->1600Gi by Joachim
open_breaches: D13: known root cause and fix recommendation went unactioned for ~5h47m after auto-decline closed the incident prematurely
A4: queue backed up twice (93k then 27k msgs) suggesting a capacity fix from a prior occurrence was not persisted
synthesis.why: D13/A4: known fix (increase & persist ClickHouse disk space) went unactioned ~5h47m after an auto-decline closed the incident before Gérard's recommendation was applied.
synthesis.suggested_action: Confirm the PVC increase is persisted in IaC/config (not just a live scale-up), and review why auto-decline fired before Gérard's recommended action was executed.

synthesis.summary: BrazilBet partner reported spoofed phishing emails using real player names/emails, asked FT to check for a breach. FT treated as P1 security, made channel private within minutes, ran a live investigation (WAF/edge, DB/ClickHouse, CRM audit, SendGrid) and found no IOCs on FT's side. Partner updated 3x via Intercom. No further activity found on incremental read - channel idle ~18h since moving to Monitoring.

synthesis.summary: Betpipo partner reported repeated logouts from 26 Jun; root cause found (shared UserTokens table collision). Two of 4 approved fix PRs merged overnight 15 Jul but these are diagnostic/observability groundwork, not the core IsAdminToken-scoping fix. An internal note logs a request for the partner to confirm if still happening, but it was posted as an internal note, not a customer-facing reply.

synthesis.suggested_action: Post an actual customer-facing reply to the partner's 10 Jul question (not just an internal note), and get a firm date for merging/deploying the remaining IsAdminToken-scoping PRs.

synthesis.summary: Campeon lifecycle coin-crediting delayed up to 2h on 11 Jul; root cause is auto-claim silently enabled on bonuses 147/199 plus a serializing credit path. Overnight, Daniel Lindengren handed off to Sam Lundborg before vacation with concrete next steps; Matteo then applied a temporary mitigation (scaled compute, raised maxReplicas) and formally transferred Lead to Sam Lundborg. None of this posted as an incident.io update or told to the partner.

synthesis.suggested_action: Post an incident.io update covering the mitigation and lead change, get Sam Lundborg to settle the VC-credit vs auto-claim decision, and inform the partner before the next silent-close nudge.

INC-9820.name: RDS OOM all brands - gradually increasing overtime

synthesis.summary: SMS distributor service has not processed queued messages for all Coinbar brands since before 30 Apr - over 1M messages backlogged. Root cause (external SMS provider outage) identified immediately, but 2.5+ months later there is zero forward progress; two more brand alerts (Hizlicasino) auto-merged in on 15 Jul, and no human commentary since 29 May (47 days).
key_events: 30 Apr: incident created, 1M+ message backlog
25-29 May: Andrea Azzopardi repeatedly asks for an explanation, no answer for 4 days
29 May: lead explains 'not much to do from SOC', pulls in Gustav Tjäder - never answered
14 Jul: Lead reassigned again to James Hodgson, no substantive update since 29 May
15 Jul: two more Hizlicasino alerts auto-merged in, 50+ alerts auto-resolved twice - 47 days of pure automation
proposals: Escalate to SMS provider - done repeatedly, no concrete response ever
Gustav Tjäder asked to advise next course of action (29 May) - never answered
open_breaches: A4: chronic multi-month issue never escalated to a decisive fix or vendor-management track - now 47 days of pure automated churn
D12/D15: the one substantive question raised (29 May) never answered or tracked - Lead rotated to at least a 6th person, new alerts keep merging in unattended
synthesis.why: A4/D12: 2.5+ months of pure automated alert churn with zero human decision-making since 29 May; the incident keeps absorbing new alerts (2 more on 15 Jul alone) with no owner actually progressing it.
synthesis.suggested_action: Force a decision: escalate to account/vendor management for a binding SMS-provider ETA or a migration decision, and assign a named owner who must respond rather than letting the lead rotate unattended.
